---
title: "volker RMarkdown Example"
output: 
  volker::html_report
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#
# 1. Setup ----
#

# Knit settings
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(volker)

# Set plot theme
theme_set(theme_vlkr())

```


```{r data, include=FALSE}
#
# 2. Load and prepare data ----
#


ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")


```

```{r}
# 3. Analyse data ----

report_counts(ds, fruit)

```

```{r}

report_metrics(ds, rank, fruit)

```
